summary: Wave 10 Phase 1 test coverage expansion: opencode-validator (65 tests), opencode-memory-bus SQLite/FTS5 spike (12 tests), opencode-learning-engine advise() edge cases (10 tests)

details.validator_tests: 65 tests, 92 expect() — ValidationResult, Validator chaining, required/type/min/max/pattern/schema, validate(), isObject, isArray
details.memory_bus_tests: 12 tests, 26 expect() — SQLite Database, table ops, prepared statements, transactions, FTS5, bm25(), error handling, data types
details.learning_engine_tests: 10 tests — advise() edge cases: empty context, undefined input, unknown task_type, shotgun_debug warning, result structure, core decay invariant, empty files, routing confidence
